questions.question: How do I pair my Garmin Fenix 8 Pro with my smartphone?
expected_answers: Open the Garmin Connect app and select Add Device
Enable Bluetooth on your phone and follow the pairing instructions
Pair the watch through Garmin Connect mobile app

questions.question: How do I load a GPX route onto my Garmin Fenix 8 Pro?
expected_answers: Upload the GPX file to Garmin Connect and sync the watch
Send the route to the device through Garmin Connect
Transfer the GPX file and sync via Garmin Express

questions.question: How do I update the firmware on my Garmin Fenix 8 Pro?
expected_answers: Connect the watch to Garmin Express and check for updates
Update the watch through Garmin Connect if an update is available
Install firmware updates using Garmin Express software

questions.question: How do I reset my Garmin Fenix 8 to factory settings?
expected_answers: Go to Settings, select System, and choose Reset
Perform a factory reset from the system settings menu
Reset the device through the settings under System

questions.question: How do I reset my Garmin Fenix 8 Pro to factory settings?
expected_answers: Go to Settings, select System, and choose Reset
Perform a factory reset from the system settings menu
Reset the device through the settings under System
